title: How Crypto Payments for Tanzanian Online Sellers Works and How to Set It Up Today — The Full Guide
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: You're a digital creator in Tanzania, but PayPal and Stripe have shut you down. Your bank in Kenya is hesitant to allow online transactions. Your local buyers can't afford the 10% transaction fees charged by your current payment processor. You've tried everything, but you still can't sell your ebooks and courses online. I get it. I've helped hundreds of creators in similar situations. Now, I'm here to show you a better way.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The reason why traditional payment processors don't work for you is that they're designed for large businesses, not digital creators. They have strict know-your-customer (KYC) requirements, which can be difficult to comply with in certain countries. On top of that, they charge high transaction fees and have strict policies around refunds and disputes. But with Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your digital products directly to your buyers, without intermediaries, and with zero transaction fees. This is the game-changer you've been looking for.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you start selling, you'll need to create an account on NOWPayments, a cryptocurrency payment processor that supports over 300 coins, including Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT. You'll also need to set up your Unchained Commerce Shop Engine, which will handle automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. Additionally, you'll need a wallet to receive payments, such as MetaMask or Trust Wallet. Don't worry if this sounds complicated – I'll walk you through each step in this guide.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

To set up your payment pipeline, you'll need to create a payment button on your NOWPayments dashboard. This will generate a unique QR code that you can share with your buyers. Next, you'll need to set up your Unchained Commerce Shop Engine to automate delivery of your digital products. This will ensure that your buyers receive their purchases instantly, without any hassle. Finally, you'll need to configure your wallet to receive payments in the cryptocurrency of your choice.
You don't need any technical expertise to set up your payment pipeline.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once you've set up your payment and delivery pipeline, it's time to go live. Share your payment button with your buyers, and start promoting your digital products on social media and other channels. When a buyer makes a purchase, your Unchained Commerce Shop Engine will automatically deliver the product, and you'll receive payment in your wallet. It's as simple as that.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

The Full Stack Bundle brings together every component needed to build a global digital store: the Core Shop Engine for backend payment verification and automated delivery, Web3 Wallet Connect for the buyer-facing checkout experience, and the Admin Dashboard for transaction tracking and order management. For creators in restricted markets, this is not a luxury — it is the minimum viable infrastructure for a professional digital business. The bundle includes a deployment guide, priority updates, and Discord support. Total cost is a one-time payment of $79.99. There are no monthly fees, no percentage cuts on sales, and no platform relationship that can be terminated by someone else's compliance decision.
How can creators in Africa sell digital products internationally?

The most practical path for creators in restricted countries is a combination of NOWPayments for payment processing and USDT on Tron for the primary payment coin. USDT is a stable coin pegged to the US dollar, which means your revenue does not fluctuate with crypto market movements. Tron network fees are under one dollar, and settlement takes under 60 seconds. Once you receive USDT in your wallet, you convert to local currency through P2P exchanges — Binance P2P, Paxful, or local platforms specific to your country. The conversion typically takes 20-30 minutes and costs 2-5% of the transaction, which is significantly less than PayPal's international transfer fees or Western Union's rates. This is the complete payment flow that thousands of creators in Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, and Bangladesh are using right now.
Unchained Commerce's payment processor has zero transaction fees.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about blockchain technology and its applications, be sure to check out our guide on 'The Future of Digital Payments'. You can also explore our range of other products, including Web3 Wallet Connect, which integrates seamlessly with NOWPayments. With Unchained Commerce, you can start selling your digital products online today.
Your Action Checklist

To set up your payment and delivery pipeline, follow these steps: (1) create an account on NOWPayments, (2) set up your Unchained Commerce Shop Engine, (3) create a payment button on your NOWPayments dashboard, (4) configure your wallet to receive payments in cryptocurrency, and (5) promote your digital products to your buyers. Don't forget to upgrade to Unchained Commerce's Admin Dashboard to access real-time analytics and transaction logs.
Your buyers can purchase your digital products using over 300 cryptocurrencies.
